Container.Name: oglabs-mcp
Container.Overview: MCP server exposing oglabs blog operations (content management, LLM/image pipeline, build/deploy) over streamable-HTTP for remote agents on the LAN. The repo is mounted at /app and provides .env (LLM + AWS credentials). No authentication by design — LAN only.
Container.Description: MCP server for the oglabs static site (Pelican -> S3/CloudFront).

Config.Name: Repo path
Config.Description: Path to the oglabs repo on the host. MUST contain .env with LLM + AWS credentials.

Config.Name: OGLABS_MCP_PORT
Config.Description: Port the server listens on inside the container (keep in sync with the published port).
